rules.rule: Each run has a stable run directory or run ID
rules.implementation: Run directories use UUID-based names (run_<uuid>) under .agentx-init/evidence/. All phase output dirs under .agentx-init/post_umbrella/ are stable per-phase.

rules.rule: Final summary files may point to latest accepted run but must not destroy prior evidence
rules.implementation: post_umbrella_summary.md and phase_manifest_complete.json reference current state. Prior run evidence in .agentx-init/evidence/ is never deleted or overwritten.

rules.rule: Append-only logs may append, not rewrite
rules.implementation: validate_events_append_only() checks event log for duplicate IDs and sequential gaps in strict mode. Event logs never overwrite prior entries.
Failure recovery results in phase_5_failure_recovery/ retain before/after source manifests. check_missing_failed_run_evidence() verifies verdict.json and evidence.json exist for each failed run dir.
Rollback logs in phase_5_failure_recovery/rollback_logs/ record before/after state for all 20 failure cases (P5-F001 to P5-F020). Source hash manifests capture both pre-rollback and post-rollback.

rules.rule: Sabotage-test evidence must be retained separately from accepted-run evidence
rules.implementation: Sabotage checks produce test outputs to tests/release/test_sabotage_checks.py which are never mixed with acceptance evidence. Sabotage evidence artifacts in phase_3_example_agents/sabotage/ are distinct from run evidence.

rules.rule: Evidence cleanup scripts, if any, must not run during acceptance
rules.implementation: No evidence cleanup scripts exist in the repository. All evidence is retained indefinitely.

validations.result: PASS — no overwritten evidence detected across phase manifests
PASS — all failed-run verdict.json and evidence.json present
PASS — no duplicate IDs or truncation found in event logs

validations.check: Detect reused run ID with different content
validations.result: PASS — no reused run IDs detected
